steps.title: Use the hypothesis
steps.content: The researchers predicted that leaders who reflected on mistakes that produced learning would show more humility than leaders who did not engage in that kind of reflection.

steps.title: Compare the group scores
steps.content: The graph shows the mistake-with-learning group scoring about 3.1, above the control group at about 2.9 and the mistake-without-learning group at about 2.6. Choice B is only an unrelated ceiling statement, Choice C understates the pattern, and Choice D depends on expectations not shown. The answer is A.
